scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external @hiero-ledger/sdk --external react --external react-dom && bun run build:types
scripts.dev: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --watch --external @hiero-ledger/sdk --external react --external react-dom
